theme_notes: Touchstones: 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout round starts (South Africa 0-1 Canada in LA); US-Iran 60-day ceasefire fracturing over warplanes near Hormuz; Utah wildfire triggers first-ever 'particularly dangerous situation' red flag in state history; Venezuela twin earthquakes, 600+ dead; Ukraine drones torch Russian oil refinery.
settled: Balanced as a ceasefire nobody believes in.
Zero owed. The World Cup group stage had more drama than you two.
Clean slate. The Strait of Hormuz isn't even this clear right now.
youOwe: Less than a World Cup stadium beer. Somehow still embarrassing.
Iran moved faster on nuclear inspectors than you're moving on this.
The Utah wildfire is 0% contained. Your finances are close behind.
You owe enough to sponsor one very sad World Cup moment.
JD Vance flew to Switzerland for a nuclear deal. You can't open Venmo.
Venezuela had rescue teams on the ground in 48 hours. You've had weeks.
This debt has outlasted more ceasefires than the Strait of Hormuz.
Ukraine drone-struck an oil refinery. You can't tap Send.
That's a Utah evacuation gas tank. Act like you're evacuating.
Round of 32 ticket money. You didn't make the round of 32.
Iran's frozen assets have a clearer payment timeline than you do.
The Venezuelan earthquake response has better momentum than this.
Economic sanctions are next. This is the pre-negotiation phase.
African teams are overperforming at the World Cup. You are not at life.
The Utah fire burned through $3k of forest. You're running parallel.
The US-Iran deal has enforcement mechanisms. So does this, now.
You've entered rogue-state territory. Expect secondary sanctions.
The 2026 World Cup prize pool is in striking distance. So is court.
theyOwe: They owe you less than a World Cup souvenir. Shame is still proportionate.
Small as a drone strike. Still counts as an act of aggression.
That's about what it costs to watch the Utah fire from a safe distance.
You are the mediator. They are the rogue state.
African underdogs are overperforming this World Cup. Channel that energy.
The wildfire is raging. So should you.
Rescue teams reached Venezuela faster than their Venmo did.
Switzerland hosted nuclear diplomacy. They can't manage a PayPal request.
Ukraine hit Russia three nights straight. Consistency. Study it.
The 60-day negotiating window has a deadline. Theirs doesn't, apparently.
The 'particularly dangerous situation' warning was about you, not the fire.
That's a World Cup quarterfinal ticket. Make them feel the weight of it.
Iran unfroze assets faster than they're clearing this tab.
You financed their lifestyle like it was earthquake relief. It was not.
Ukraine funded drone ops on a Russian refinery for less. Escalate.
Congratulations. You are now a geopolitical crisis in their life.
The World Cup prize fund is within reach. Foreclose. Win the cup.
The Strait of Hormuz is more open to negotiation than they are.
